# fly_oidc_token (Data Source)

Requests an OIDC token from Fly.io. The token is ephemeral and regenerated on every read.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_oidc_token" "github" {
  app = "my-app"
  aud = "https://github.com/my-org"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `aud` (String) The audience claim for the OIDC token.

### Read-Only

- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated OIDC token (JWT).
